_doc: 2024 SRD 5.2 Weapon Mastery properties. Each weapon in weapons.json has at most one mastery slug. Class progression lists how many mastery weapons a class may use simultaneously at each level (the 'mastery_choices' map on an actor's Inventory pins which weapons currently consume a mastery slot).

masteries.label: Cleave
masteries.effect: On a hit with a Heavy melee weapon, you can deal weapon-die damage to a second creature within 5 ft of the original target and within your reach. Once per turn.

masteries.label: Graze
masteries.effect: On a miss with a melee attack, deal damage equal to your attack-ability modifier (min 0) of the weapon's damage type.

masteries.label: Nick
masteries.effect: When you make the extra attack of the Light property, you can do so as part of the Attack action instead of as a bonus action; only once per turn.

masteries.label: Push
masteries.effect: On a hit, you can push a Large or smaller target up to 10 ft in a straight line away from you.

masteries.label: Sap
masteries.effect: On a hit, the target has disadvantage on its next attack roll before the start of your next turn.

masteries.label: Slow
masteries.effect: On a hit that deals damage, the target's speed is reduced by 10 ft until the start of your next turn (no stacking).

masteries.label: Topple
masteries.effect: On a hit, the target must make a Constitution save (DC 8 + your attack-ability mod + your Proficiency Bonus) or have the Prone condition.

masteries.label: Vex
masteries.effect: On a hit that deals damage, you have advantage on your next attack roll against that target before the end of your next turn.
